rounds.theorem_statement: theorem round1_challenge (n : ℕ) (hn : n > 0) : (Finset.range n).sum (fun i => 2 * i + 1) = n ^ 2
rounds.proof:
:= by
  induction n with
  | zero => omega
  | succ k ih =>
    rw [Finset.sum_range_succ]
    by_cases hk : k > 0
    · rw [ih hk]; ring
    · push_neg at hk
      interval_cases k
      simp

rounds.theorem_statement: theorem round2_challenge : ∀ (f : ℤ → ℤ), (∀ x y : ℤ, f (x + y) = f x + f y) → f 0 = 0 → (∀ n : ℤ, f n = n * f 1)
rounds.proof:
:= by
  intro f hadd hf0
  intro n
  induction n using Int.induction_on with
  | zero => simp [hf0]
  | succ k ih =>
    have := hadd k 1
    linarith
  | pred k ih =>
    have h1 : f (-1) = -(f 1) := by
      have := hadd 1 (-1)
      simp at this
      linarith [hf0]
    have h2 := hadd (-↑k) (-1)
    have h3 : (-↑k : ℤ) + -1 = -↑k - 1 := by ring
    rw [h3] at h2
    linarith

rounds.theorem_statement: theorem round3_challenge (p : ℕ) (hp : Nat.Prime p) (hp2 : p % 4 = 3) : ¬ ∃ (a b : ℤ), a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 = p
rounds.proof:
:= by
  intro ⟨a, b, hab⟩
  have key : ∀ (x : ℤ), x % 2 = 0 ∨ x % 2 = 1 := fun x => by omega
  have sq_mod4 : ∀ (x : ℤ), x ^ 2 % 4 = 0 ∨ x ^ 2 % 4 = 1 := by
    intro x
    rcases key x with h | h
    · left; obtain ⟨k, hk⟩ := (Int.dvd_iff_emod_eq_zero).mpr h; rw [hk]; ring_nf; omega
    · right; obtain ⟨k, hk⟩ : ∃ k, x = 2 * k + 1 := ⟨x / 2, by omega⟩; rw [hk]; ring_nf; omega
  rcases sq_mod4 a with ha | ha <;> rcases sq_mod4 b with hb | hb <;> {
    have : (a ^ 2 + b ^ 2) % 4 = (p : ℤ) % 4 := by rw [hab]
    have : (p : ℤ) % 4 = 3 := by omega
    omega
  }

rounds.theorem_statement:
theorem round4_challenge (a b c : ℝ) (ha : a > 0) (hb : b > 0) (hc : c > 0)
  (habc : a * b * c = 1) : a + b + c ≤ a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 + c ^ 2
rounds.proof:
:= by
  nlinarith [sq_nonneg (a - 1), sq_nonneg (b - 1), sq_nonneg (c - 1),
             sq_nonneg (a * b - 1), sq_nonneg (b * c - 1), sq_nonneg (a * c - 1),
             mul_pos ha hb, mul_pos hb hc, mul_pos ha hc,
             sq_nonneg a, sq_nonneg b, sq_nonneg c]

rounds.theorem_statement:
theorem round5_challenge :
  ∀ (n : ℕ), n ≥ 2 → (Finset.filter (fun d => d ∣ n) (Finset.range (n + 1))).sum id ≥ n + 1
rounds.proof:
:= by
  intro n hn
  have h1 : 1 ∈ Finset.filter (fun d => d ∣ n) (Finset.range (n + 1)) := by
    simp [Finset.mem_filter, Finset.mem_range]; omega
  have hn_mem : n ∈ Finset.filter (fun d => d ∣ n) (Finset.range (n + 1)) := by
    simp [Finset.mem_filter, Finset.mem_range]
  have h1n : (1 : ℕ) ≠ n := by omega
  have hsub : {1, n} ⊆ Finset.filter (fun d => d ∣ n) (Finset.range (n + 1)) := by
    intro x hx
    simp at hx
    rcases hx with rfl | rfl <;> assumption
  calc (Finset.filter (fun d => d ∣ n) (Finset.range (n + 1))).sum id
      ≥ ({1, n} : Finset ℕ).sum id := Finset.sum_le_sum_of_subset hsub
    _ = n + 1 := by simp [Finset.sum_pair h1n]; omega

rounds.theorem_statement:
theorem round6_challenge :
  ∀ (n : ℕ), n ≥ 1 →
  (Finset.range n).sum (fun i => (1 : ℚ) / ((i + 1) * (i + 2))) = n / (n + 1)
rounds.proof:
:= by
  intro n hn
  induction n with
  | zero => omega
  | succ k ih =>
    rw [Finset.sum_range_succ]
    by_cases hk : k ≥ 1
    · rw [ih hk]
      push_cast
      have hk1 : (k : ℚ) + 1 ≠ 0 := by positivity
      have hk2 : (k : ℚ) + 2 ≠ 0 := by positivity
      field_simp
      ring
    · push_neg at hk
      interval_cases k
      norm_num

rounds.theorem_statement:
theorem round7_challenge (n : ℕ) (hn : 0 < n) :
  ∃ (a : ZMod n), a + a = 0
rounds.proof: := ⟨0, by simp⟩

rounds.theorem_statement:
theorem round8_challenge (a b c d : ℤ) 
  (h1 : a * d - b * c = 1) :
  Int.gcd (a + b) (c + d) = 1
rounds.proof:
:= by
  have hcop : IsCoprime (a + b) (c + d) := ⟨d, -b, by ring_nf; linarith⟩
  exact_mod_cast Int.isCoprime_iff_gcd_eq_one.mp hcop
:= by native_decide

rounds.theorem_statement:
theorem round10_challenge (p : ℕ) (hp : Nat.Prime p) (hp5 : p ≥ 5) :
  24 ∣ p ^ 2 - 1
rounds.proof:
:= by
  have hodd : p % 2 = 1 := by
    rcases hp.eq_two_or_odd with rfl | h <;> omega
  have hmod3 : p % 3 = 1 ∨ p % 3 = 2 := by
    have : ¬ (3 ∣ p) := fun h => absurd (hp.eq_one_or_self_of_dvd 3 h) (by omega)
    omega
  suffices h : (24 : ℤ) ∣ ((p : ℤ) ^ 2 - 1) by
    have hle : 1 ≤ p ^ 2 := by nlinarith
    zify [hle] at *
    exact_mod_cast h
  have h8 : (8 : ℤ) ∣ ((p : ℤ) ^ 2 - 1) := by
    have hmod4 : (p : ℤ) % 4 = 1 ∨ (p : ℤ) % 4 = 3 := by omega
    rcases hmod4 with h | h
    · obtain ⟨k, hk⟩ : ∃ k : ℤ, (p : ℤ) = 4 * k + 1 := ⟨(p : ℤ) / 4, by omega⟩
      rw [hk]
      exact ⟨2 * k ^ 2 + k, by ring⟩
    · obtain ⟨k, hk⟩ : ∃ k : ℤ, (p : ℤ) = 4 * k + 3 := ⟨(p : ℤ) / 4, by omega⟩
      rw [hk]
      exact ⟨2 * k ^ 2 + 3 * k + 1, by ring⟩
  have h3 : (3 : ℤ) ∣ ((p : ℤ) ^ 2 - 1) := by
    rcases hmod3 with h | h
    · obtain ⟨k, hk⟩ : ∃ k : ℤ, (p : ℤ) = 3 * k + 1 := ⟨(p : ℤ) / 3, by omega⟩
      rw [hk]
      exact ⟨3 * k ^ 2 + 2 * k, by ring⟩
    · obtain ⟨k, hk⟩ : ∃ k : ℤ, (p : ℤ) = 3 * k + 2 := ⟨(p : ℤ) / 3, by omega⟩
      rw [hk]
      exact ⟨3 * k ^ 2 + 4 * k + 1, by ring⟩
  exact IsCoprime.mul_dvd (by decide) h8 h3

rounds.theorem_statement: theorem sum_of_squares_mod4 (n : ℤ) : (2*n + 1)^2 % 4 = 1
rounds.proof: := by ring_nf; omega

rounds.theorem_statement: theorem nat_coprime_pow_add (a b : ℕ) (h : Nat.Coprime a b) (n : ℕ) : Nat.Coprime (a^n) (b^n)
rounds.proof: := by exact (h.pow n n)

rounds.theorem_statement:
theorem finset_sum_range_sq (n : ℕ) : 
  6 * ∑ i ∈ Finset.range n, (i : ℤ)^2 = n * (n - 1) * (2*n - 1)
rounds.proof:
:= by induction n with
  | zero => simp
  | succ n ih => 
    rw [Finset.sum_range_succ]
    push_cast
    linarith [ih]

rounds.theorem_statement: theorem list_palindrome_reverse (l : List ℕ) (h : l = l.reverse) : l.reverse = l
rounds.proof: := h.symm

rounds.theorem_statement:
theorem zmod_units_card_prime (p : ℕ) [hp : Fact p.Prime] : 
  Fintype.card (ZMod p)ˣ = p - 1
rounds.proof:
:= by
  rw [ZMod.card_units_eq_totient, Nat.totient_prime hp.out]

rounds.theorem_statement:
theorem polynomial_eval_geom_sum (x : ℝ) (n : ℕ) :
  (∑ i ∈ Finset.range (n + 1), x ^ i) * (x - 1) = x ^ (n + 1) - 1
rounds.proof:
:= by
  induction n with
  | zero => simp
  | succ n ih =>
    rw [Finset.sum_range_succ]
    ring_nf
    ring_nf at ih
    linarith

rounds.theorem_statement: theorem sq_add_sq_eq_zero_iff (a b : ℝ) : a^2 + b^2 = 0 ↔ a = 0 ∧ b = 0
rounds.proof:
:= by
  constructor
  · intro h
    have ha : a^2 ≥ 0 := sq_nonneg a
    have hb : b^2 ≥ 0 := sq_nonneg b
    have ha0 : a^2 = 0 := by linarith
    have hb0 : b^2 = 0 := by linarith
    exact ⟨by nlinarith [sq_nonneg a], by nlinarith [sq_nonneg b]⟩
  · rintro ⟨rfl, rfl⟩; ring

rounds.theorem_statement: theorem nat_factorial_dvd_factorial_of_le {m n : ℕ} (h : m ≤ n) : m.factorial ∣ n.factorial
rounds.proof: := Nat.factorial_dvd_factorial h

rounds.theorem_statement:
theorem prime_not_dvd_of_lt_and_coprime (p q : ℕ) (hp : p.Prime) (hq : q.Prime) 
    (hpq : p ≠ q) : ¬(p ∣ q)
rounds.proof:
:= by
  intro h
  have := hq.eq_one_or_self_of_dvd p h
  rcases this with h1 | h2
  · exact absurd h1 hp.one_lt.ne'
  · exact hpq h2

rounds.theorem_statement:
theorem exists_prime_between_n_and_factorial_plus_one (n : ℕ) (hn : 2 ≤ n) :
    ∃ p : ℕ, p.Prime ∧ n ≤ p ∧ p ≤ n.factorial + 1
rounds.proof:
:= by
  have hfact_pos : 0 < n.factorial := Nat.factorial_pos n
  obtain ⟨p, hp_prime, hp_dvd⟩ := (n.factorial + 1).exists_prime_and_dvd (by omega)
  refine ⟨p, hp_prime, ?_, Nat.le_of_dvd (by omega) hp_dvd⟩
  by_contra h
  push Not at h
  have hp_dvd_fact : p ∣ n.factorial := hp_prime.dvd_factorial.mpr (by omega)
  -- p | (n! + 1) and p | n! implies p | 1
  have h1 : p ∣ 1 := by
    have := (Nat.dvd_add_right hp_dvd_fact).mp hp_dvd
    exact this
  exact absurd hp_prime.one_lt (Nat.not_lt.mpr (Nat.le_of_dvd Nat.one_pos h1))
